title: [WIP] fix some CI failures
body:
trying to get "Integration test" in travis to pass.  I'll drop the WIP tag once it is ready for review.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@giuseppe This won't work - all the Travis tests are containerized, they don't use the host environment. You need to modify the Dockerfile to fix them.

I'm pretty sure install.libseccomp is already in the dockerfile too.
@giuseppe  I think I just fixed the travis issues, but I think you need to rebase your PR to fix it.

rebased and pushed now, I still see failures for the varlink tests but it looks like @baude is going to disable them for now in https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/691 so should be fine.

It seems the python varlink are broken somehow as I didn't manage to get them working in the go:1.8 container.  Tried both python2 and python3
